description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte black and bronze color scheme. It is equipped with a collapsible stock, a vertical foregrip, and a detachable box magazine, making it suitable for rapid deployment and urban combat scenarios. The upper receiver sports a full-length Picatinny rail, on which a holographic sight is mounted for quick target acquisition. The barrel is medium length and fitted with a flash hider at the muzzle, while the handguard has additional rails for accessory attachments. The pistol grip and stock are ergonomically shaped for comfort and control. The overall build suggests a robust construction, likely using a combination of metal alloys and polymer components.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a black and bronze finish, collapsible stock, holographic sight, and vertical foregrip. Features a detachable box magazine and a flash hider on the barrel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, flash hider, and alignment of the holographic sight.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full profile, including the collapsible stock, vertical foregrip, magazine, and mounted sight.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, pistol grip, and the back of the holographic sight.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ejection port, magazine, and accessory rails.
